task_name: Evidence-based QA on Long Documents (with Page Citations)

subtask1.query: Please read workspace/query.md for task instructions. Answer the 4 questions in context/q.md based solely on the PDF provided in context/; annotate each factual statement with [Page N]; if the document does not mention it, answer "Context mentions nothing about this". Submit answers.md.
deliverables: answers.md - Answer each of the four questions with [Page N] citations after each fact

rubric.notes: Q1 must include 33% and 65% with citations; Q2 must include >10% EBIT with citations; Q3 must identify the top risk as Inaccuracy at 63% with citations; Q4 must give a clear negative answer (not mentioned) without fabricating scores.
